metadata.name: Nordic Energy Trading
metadata.description: Manifest for energy trading operations supporting electricity spot market trading, carbon credit management, and cross-currency settlement.

sagas.name: process_energy_settlement
sagas.script:
def execute(ctx):
    # Validate the settlement request
    meter_data = ctx.input
    
    # Record energy delivery in inventory
    position_keeping.initiate_log(
        account_id=meter_data.supplier_account,
        amount=meter_data.quantity,
        instrument_code="KWH",
        direction="CREDIT",
    )
    
    # Value the energy in settlement currency
    valuation = current_account.evaluate_asset_valuation(
        account_id=meter_data.buyer_account,
        instrument_code="KWH",
        amount=meter_data.quantity,
    )
    
    # Debit the buyer
    current_account.execute_withdrawal(
        account_id=meter_data.buyer_account,
        amount=valuation.output.amount,
        instrument_code=valuation.output.instrument_code,
        reference="energy-settlement:" + meter_data.settlement_id,
    )
    
    # Credit the supplier
    current_account.execute_deposit(
        account_id=meter_data.supplier_account,
        amount=valuation.output.amount,
        instrument_code=valuation.output.instrument_code,
        reference="energy-settlement:" + meter_data.settlement_id,
    )
    
    return {"status": "settled", "settlement_id": meter_data.settlement_id}

sagas.name: daily_energy_reconciliation
